request.prompt: Create a clean classroom slide visual for a school teacher presentation. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10 / General. Session title: Chemical Substances and Their Properties. Slide title: Topic Introduction. Visual requirement: A concept introduction visual for Chemical Substances and Their Properties with clear educational focus.. Style: accurate, educational, uncluttered, presentation-friendly, white or light background, teacher-safe, no watermark. Important: do not include words, labels, text, captions, letters, or numbers inside the image. Prefer a clean central composition with diagram-like educational clarity. Do not imitate stock-photo websites or watermarked online classroom graphics.
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter
